title: encrypted=true + bodySnippet present: invariant not enforced on deserialization
description: Spec §4.2: bodySnippet MUST be absent when encrypted is true. The type system allows ChatMessageEntry { encrypted: true, body_snippet: Some("...") } from a misbehaving server. The test only checks the server-absent case; it does not test that a payload with encrypted=true AND bodySnippet present is rejected. A client rendering body_snippet from an encrypted message could silently leak E2EE content assumptions. Fix: add a custom Deserialize (or post-parse validation) that returns an error if encrypted is true and body_snippet is Some.
close_reason: design decision: encrypted+bodySnippet coexistence is a server invariant; documented in type comment
